question.stem: Where should the protractor centre be placed when drawing an angle?
options: On the vertex (end of the baseline)
At the mid-point of the baseline
At the far end of the baseline
question.answer: On the vertex (end of the baseline)

accepted_answers: On the vertex (end of the baseline)

question.stem: What should the 0° line of the protractor be aligned with when drawing an angle?

options: They drew the baseline too long

question.stem: A student intended to draw 70° but their angle measures 110°. What is true about 70° and 110°?
options: They add up to 180° — the wrong scale was used
question.answer: They add up to 180° — the wrong scale was used

accepted_answers: They add up to 180° — the wrong scale was used

question.stem: A student intended to draw 150° but used the wrong scale. What angle did they actually draw?
To draw an obtuse angle such as 120°, where should the mark appear on the protractor scale?
A student places the protractor centre in the middle of the baseline rather than at the vertex. What problem does this cause?
options: The two arms will not meet correctly at the vertex
No problem — the result is the same
question.answer: The two arms will not meet correctly at the vertex

accepted_answers: The two arms will not meet correctly at the vertex

question.stem: Drawing an angle is sometimes called 'measuring in reverse'. What does this mean?
options: Both use the same alignment skills, but drawing marks a point rather than reading one
Drawing uses a compass, measuring uses a protractor
question.answer: Both use the same alignment skills, but drawing marks a point rather than reading one

accepted_answers: Both use the same alignment skills, but drawing marks a point rather than reading one

question.stem: A student intended to draw 55° but used the wrong scale. What angle did they actually draw?
You intended to draw an obtuse angle but the result looks acute. What should you do?
options: Use the other scale and re-draw
Erase the baseline and start again from scratch
question.answer: Use the other scale and re-draw

accepted_answers: Use the other scale and re-draw

question.stem: What is the last step when drawing an angle with a protractor?
options: Draw the second arm from the vertex through the marked dot
Mark the vertex with a dot
question.answer: Draw the second arm from the vertex through the marked dot

accepted_answers: Draw the second arm from the vertex through the marked dot
